use_cases: Interactive button for triggering actions with icon support
Form submission and navigation triggers with multiple visual variants
Icon-sized action buttons for toolbars and grid layouts
Accessible button component with focus states and disabled handling
ai_summary: A flexible React button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, offering 6 visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and 4 sizes including icon-only. Features subtle shadows, rounded corners, and comprehensive hover/focus/disabled states. Designed for use in icon grids, toolbars, and action-heavy interfaces with full keyboard navigation support.
